meta.summary: sourmash 4.9.4 command-line and Python runtime for k-mer sketching, comparison, search, gather, and taxonomy workflows with user-provided signature databases.
meta.description: sourmash 4.9.4 command-line and Python runtime for k-mer sketching, comparison, search, gather, and taxonomy workflows with user-provided signature databases.

test: sourmash --version 2>&1 | grep -Fx 'sourmash 4.9.4' >/dev/null && python -c 'import importlib.metadata as md; import sourmash, screed, numpy, scipy, matplotlib, cffi, redis, ipfshttpclient; print(md.version("sourmash"))' | grep -Fx '4.9.4' >/dev/null

sourmash --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'sourmash' >/dev/null && sourmash sketch dna --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'sourmash sketch dna' >/dev/null && sourmash compare --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'sourmash compare' >/dev/null && sourmash search --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'sourmash search' >/dev/null && sourmash tax --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'sourmash tax' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-sourmash-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; /opt/sourmash/share/testdata/sourmash_smoke.sh "$tmp" && test -s "$tmp/a.sig" && test -s "$tmp/b.sig" && test -s "$tmp/cmp" && test -s "$tmp/cmp.matrix.png" && test -s "$tmp/search.txt" && grep -F 'sample_a' "$tmp/search.txt" >/dev/null && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: sourmash
upstream.citation: Pierce-Ward et al. sourmash v4: A multitool to quickly search, compare, and analyze genomic and metagenomic data sets. Journal of Open Source Software 9(98):6830 (2024).
